tagline.en: A coding agent for real software engineering work.
tagline.zh: 面向真实软件工程工作的编程代理。

description.en: Forge Next is growing toward a coding agent that can understand a repository, plan and make changes, verify its work, recover from failures, collaborate with humans, and prepare clean delivery units.
description.zh: Forge Next 的目标是成为能理解代码仓库、规划并执行修改、验证结果、从失败中恢复、和人协作，并整理干净交付单元的编程代理。

en: Works inside a local repository and keeps code changes visible.
Uses verification and failure feedback to improve its own work.
Builds toward clean review and delivery workflows, not just one-off edits.
zh: 在本地代码仓库中工作，并保持代码变更可检查。
利用验证结果和失败反馈改进自己的工作。
面向清晰的审查和交付流程，而不只是一次性改代码。
